title: Road Damage and Potholes
description: Our local roads are getting harder to navigate by the day. From deep potholes to crumbling asphalt, these conditions aren't just an inconvenience—they're a safety hazard for drivers, cyclists, and pedestrians alike.
caption: Our local roads are getting harder to navigate by the day. From deep potholes to crumbling asphalt, these conditions aren't just an inconvenience—they're a safety hazard for drivers, cyclists, and pedestrians alike.

title: Snakes on Neighborhood Roads
description: Looks like the local snakes are taking "street food" a bit too literally. We've spotted a few slithering friends trying to cross the neighborhood roads lately.
caption: Looks like the local snakes are taking "street food" a bit too literally. We've spotted a few slithering friends trying to cross the neighborhood roads lately.

title: Parking Crisis in Local Area
description: The lack of parking in our area has officially reached a breaking point. It's affecting local businesses and making daily commutes a nightmare for residents.
caption: The lack of parking in our area has officially reached a breaking point. It's affecting local businesses and making daily commutes a nightmare for residents.
